title: verbascum × parvifloriforme
intro: Verbascum × parvifloriforme, also known as the hybrid mullein or verbascum, is a rare hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Verbascum blattaria and Verbascum phoeniceum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × parvifloriforme include reducing inflammation, soothing irritated skin, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate symptoms associated with colds, flu, and other respiratory conditions.
